mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prompt_templates (template_key, version, name, system_prompt, user_template, variables, status) VALUES (#{templateKey}, #{version}, #{name}, #{systemPrompt}, #{userTemplate}, #{variables}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_key, version, name, system_prompt, user_template, variables, status, created_at, updated_at FROM prompt_templates WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, template_key, version, name, system_prompt, user_template, variables, status, created_at, updated_at FROM prompt_templates WHERE template_key = #{templateKey} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, template_key, version, name, system_prompt, user_template, variables, status, created_at, updated_at FROM prompt_templates WHERE template_key = #{templateKey} ORDER BY version DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE prompt_templates SET status = #{status} WHERE template_key = #{templateKey} AND version = #{version}
